title: Moody's (MCO)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Moody's. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what Moody's is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Derived directly from the Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of Moody's historical financials over the last 5 years. This assumes the company can maintain its historical growth trajectory for the next 5 years.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
Derived directly from the Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of Moody's historical financials over the last 5 years. This assumes the company can maintain its historical growth trajectory for the next 5 years.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
The long-term growth rate applied after year 5. Derived as a percentage of the 10Y Treasury yield to approximate long-term nominal GDP growth, capped at 3.5% to ensure it does not exceed economic growth.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
